sections.paragraph:
m. [suff. חָדְשֹׁו, plur. חֳדָשִׁים] the new moon, the day of the new moon, the calends of a lunar month which was a festival of the ancient Hebrews, Num 29:6 1Sa 20:5 18:24 Exo 19:1, בַּתֹדֶשׁ הַשְּׁלִישִׁי “on the third calends” (the third new moon), i.e. the first of the third lunar month. Hos 5:7, עַתָּה יאֹכְלֵם חֹדֶשׁ “now shall a new moon devour them,” i.e. they shall be destroyed at the time of the new moon.

(2) a lunar month, beginning at the new moon. Gen 8:5 Exo 13:5, etc. חֹדֶשׁ יָמִים the period of a month (see יָמִים ). Gen 29:14 Num 11:20, 21 Num 11:21.

(3) [Hodesh], pr.n. f., 1Ch 8:9.
